overview: Magistral 1.0 (Small & Medium) is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Magistral line. Released 2025-06-10. Chain-of-thought reasoning line in open Small and premier Medium sizes.
What's notable in this version: Mistral's first reasoning models; Small (24B, Apache 2.0) and premier Medium (magistral-*-2506).
